{{Quote|Cover ears! Big boom-boom coming!|Tek|<ref name="Three Against the Galaxy">{{Tales|3|Three Against the Galaxy}}</ref>}}
'''Tek''' was a [[Jawa/Legends|Jawa]] with a taste for explosions. Stranded on [[Otunia]] and blamed for the [[Death/Legends|death]] of a farmer, Tek was a wanted man with a [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] of twelve thousand [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] on his head.

==Biography==
[[File:TekAiming-Tales3.jpg|thumb|left|Tek goes to work]]
Tek joined forces with [[Grissom (Gamorrean)|Grissom]] the [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]] and [[Lorn Kabul]]'s daughter [[Arista Kabul|Arista]], who were on the run from Lorn's evil brother, [[Seth Kabul]], and his men. Feeling sympathy with Grissom and Arista, Tek helped them escape and also assisted them in sabotaging Seth's operation.

Tek agreed to be turned over to the authorities by Grissom, so Grissom and Arista would receive the bounty, only to be rescued again by Grissom later the same day. Twelve thousand credits and two friends richer, Tek finally made it off the [[Planet/Legends|planet]].

==Appearances==
*{{Tales|3|Three Against the Galaxy}} {{1st}}
